messages.subject: RE: Pilot pricing request: India SIP trunk / Voice API for AI calling
messages.preview: Hi Pranjal, Thank you for the update. Noted on the ticket closure. We are continuing our internal evaluation/pilot setup and will open a fresh request if we need further assistance from Vobiz. No additional commercial commitment is approved from our side
messages.body:
Hi Pranjal, Thank you for the update. Noted on the ticket closure. We are continuing our internal evaluation/pilot setup and will open a fresh request if we need further assistance from Vobiz. No additional commercial commitment is approved from our side at this stage. Regards, AICloudStrategist Operations
________________________________
From: Pranjal from Vobiz AI <support@vobiz.ai>
Sent: Tuesday, 19 May 2026 04:38:17
To: Rajiv Gupta <support@aicloudstrategist.com>
Subject: Re: Pilot pricing request: India SIP trunk / Voice API for AI calling



Certainly, team! Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need any further assistance.

Pranjal

Vobiz AI

________________________________
Powered by Intercom<https://www.intercom.com/intercom-link?company=Vobiz+AI&solution=customer-support>
On Mon, May 18, 2026 at 17:37 PM, Rajiv Gupta <support@aicloudstrategist.com<mailto:support@aicloudstrategist.com>> wrote:

Hi Pranjal, Thank you for the update. Noted on the ticket closure. We are continuing our internal evaluation/pilot setup and will open a fresh request if we need further assistance from Vobiz. No additional commercial commitment is approved from our side at this stage. Regards, AICloudStrategist Operations

________________________________
From: Pranjal from Vobiz AI <support@vobiz.ai<mailto:support@vobiz.ai>>
Sent: Monday, 18 May 2026 04:11:30
To: Rajiv Gupta <support@aicloudstrategist.com<mailto:support@aicloudstrategist.com>>
Subject: Re: Pilot pricing request: India SIP trunk / Voice API for AI calling

We are closing this ticket as we have not received a response from you. Please feel free to reach out if you need any further assistance.

Pranjal

Vobiz AI

________________________________
Powered by Intercom<https://www.intercom.com/intercom-link?company=Vobiz+AI&solution=customer-support>
On Fri, May 15, 2026 at 14:59 PM, Pranjal from Vobiz AI <support@vobiz.ai<mailto:support@vobiz.ai>> wrote:

1) We are happy to let you know that there are no onboarding fees. Please keep in mind that each DID you purchase has a one-time setup fee.

2) There is no monthly minimum requirement unless you have selected a partner account. To use our services, such as purchasing DIDs or making calls, you will need to add some credit to your wallet.

3) Typically, Indian DIDs have a monthly rental fee of 500₹. You can explore the available options in the Purchase DID section at your convenience.

4/5) Here are the inbound and outbound per minute rates for your reference:

- Call: 0.45 ₹/min

- Stream: 0.20 ₹/min

- Recording: 0.10 ₹/min

- Transcription: 0.10 ₹/min

- Non Connected Call Fees : 0.02 ₹ per call.

6) Your account includes a default concurrency of 3. If you need more, you can purchase additional blocks of 10 at a monthly rental of 4990₹.

7) To help you get started, we provide a free trial credit of 25₹.

8) KYC verification is required. If you are a business, please provide the necessary documents. The entire process can be completed easily through the console.

9) For your convenience, here are our integration documents:

https://docs.vobiz.ai/introduction

10) Our DID provisioning is instant, so you can activate your account as soon as you create a trunk and start using the service right away. If you expect very high call volumes, please feel free to contact atul@vobiz.ai<mailto:atul@vobiz.ai> for assistance with the Partner console.

On Thu, May 14, 2026 at 22:15 PM, Rajiv Gupta <support@aicloudstrategist.com<mailto:support@aicloudstrategist.com>> wrote:

Hello Team,

We are AICloudStrategist, evaluating a low-cost India-only AI voice calling setup for a new SMB consulting/automation service.

Requirement:
- Indian number for inbound calls; preferably 10-digit mobile-series or landline DID.
- AI voicebot should answer calls independently without a human operator.
- Outbound API-triggered calls to Indian mobile numbers in later phase.
- SIP, WebSocket, RTP/media streaming, or LiveKit/Pipecat/Asterisk compatible integration with our own AI agent.
- Start very small: 1 concurrent channel initially.
- We need low upfront/no heavy setup cost. Monthly prepaid or pay-as-you-go is preferred.
- Usage initially will be low while we validate business demand.

Please share your cheapest possible pilot pricing with full breakup:
1. Setup/onboarding fee, if any.
2. Monthly minimum or prepaid requirement.
3. Indian number/DID rental.
4. Inbound per-minute rate.
5. Outbound per-minute rate to Indian mobiles.
6. Concurrent channel cost.
7. Any deposit, KYC, GST, or documentation required.
8. Whether free trial/sandbox/test credits are available.
9. SIP/WebSocket/RTP/LiveKit compatibility details and sample integration docs.
10. Timeline to activate a pilot.

We are specifically avoiding high upfront enterprise packages at this stage. If a pilot can be started under ₹2,000–₹5,000/month with minimal setup, please mention that clearly.

Regards,
AICloudStrategist Team
support@aicloudstrategist.com<mailto:support@aicloudstrategist.com>
